data.name: ERR_CloseParenExpected
data.value: ')' expected.

data.name: ERR_FloatOverflow
data.value: Floating-point constant is too large for '{0}'.

data.name: ERR_IdentifierExpected
data.value: Identifier expected.

data.name: ERR_IdentifierExpectedKW
data.value: Identifier expected; '{0}' is a keyword.

data.name: ERR_IllegalEscape
data.value: Illegal escape sequence at position {0} (length {1}).

data.name: ERR_IntOverflow
data.value: Integer literal is too large.

data.name: ERR_InvalidNumber
data.value: Invalid number literal at position {0} (length {1}).

data.name: ERR_InvalidNumber_WithoutPosition
data.value: Invalid number literal.

data.name: ERR_InvalidReal
data.value: Invalid real literal.

data.name: ERR_LbraceExpected
data.value: '{' expected.

data.name: ERR_OpenEndedComment
data.value: Unterminated multi-line comment.

data.name: ERR_RbraceExpected
data.value: '}' expected.

data.name: ERR_SemicolonExpected
data.value: ';' expected.

data.name: ERR_SyntaxError
data.value: Syntax error; '{0}' expected.

data.name: ERR_UnexpectedCharacter
data.value: Unexpected character: {0}

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_InvalidMarkupChild
data.value: Markup child '{0}' is not assignable to expected content type '{1}'.

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_AkcssInvalidColor
data.value: AKCSS color value '{0}' is not valid for property '{1}'.

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_AkcssInvalidThickness
data.value: AKCSS thickness tuple '{0}' is not valid for property '{1}'.

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_AkcssExpressionError
data.value: AKCSS expression '{0}' is not valid C#: {1}

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_AkcssPropertyNotFound
data.value: AKCSS property '{0}' was not found on style target '{1}'.

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_MarkupPropertyNotFound
data.value: Property '{0}' was not found on component '{1}'.

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_MarkupExpressionError
data.value: Markup expression '{0}' is not valid C#: {1}

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_MarkupAttributeValueCannotConvert
data.value: Markup attribute value for '{0}' cannot be converted from '{1}' to '{2}'.

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_MarkupAttributeBindingNotAllowed
data.value: Markup attribute binding '{0}' is not allowed for parameter '{1}' declared as '{2}'.

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_MarkupDuplicatePropertySetter
data.value: Markup property '{0}' already has a setter on this element.

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_MarkupEventBindingNotAllowed
data.value: Markup event '{0}' does not support '{1}' binding. Use a normal event handler expression.

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_MarkupEventHandlerSignatureMismatch
data.value: Markup event '{0}' expects handler '{1}', but received '{2}'.

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_TailwindUtilityNotFound
data.value: Tailwind utility '{0}' was not found for component '{1}'.

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_TailwindUtilityAmbiguous
data.value: Tailwind utility '{0}' is ambiguous for component '{1}'.

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_TailwindUtilityArgumentMismatch
data.value: Tailwind utility '{0}' expects {1} argument(s), but {2} were provided.

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_AkcssImportNotFound
data.value: AKCSS import '{0}' was not found.

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_AkcssApplyItemNotFound
data.value: AKCSS apply item '{0}' was not found.

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_AkcssApplyItemAmbiguous
data.value: AKCSS apply item '{0}' is ambiguous.

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_AkcssInterceptTypeNotFound
data.value: AKCSS intercept type '{0}' was not found.

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_AkcssInterceptTypeInvalid
data.value: AKCSS intercept type '{0}' must inherit from {1}.

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_AkcssInterceptIgnoresMember
data.value: AKCSS member '{0}' is ignored because '{1}' is intercepted by '{2}'.

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_AkcssSelectorTargetNotFound
data.value: AKCSS selector target type '{0}' was not found.

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_StateBindingExpressionExpected
data.value: State binding expression '{0}' must be a binding path such as 'vm', 'vm.Name', or 'vm.Items[0].Name'.

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_StateBindingSourceNotObservable
data.value: State binding source '{0}' cannot be observed as '{1}'. Use IObservable<{1}> or implement INotifyPropertyChanged on '{2}'.

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_StateBindingTargetNotWritable
data.value: State binding target '{0}' must be a writable property or field.

data.name: AKBURA_SEMANTIC_UserHookMustBeTopLevel
data.value: User hook '{0}' must be called only from a top-level state initializer.

data.name: WRN_ErrorOverride
data.value: Error '{0}' was reported as a warning.
